content.speakerText: You really knocked it out of the park with the Q3 client rollout — congrats!
content.speakerTextCn: 你第三季度的客户上线做得太棒了，恭喜！

options.text: Thanks! I did it all by myself.
Thanks! I’m proud we hit the deadline ahead of schedule.
I guess the client was easy to work with.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调了团队成就和提前完成目标，符合职场中谦逊且突出成果的回应方式。选项1过于自我中心，不符合团队文化；选项3过于贬低成就，显得不自信；选项4转移焦点到客户，未回应对方的表扬。

content.speakerText: What’s one thing you’re most proud of this year?
content.speakerTextCn: 今年你最自豪的一件事是什么？

options.text: I was just lucky this year.
I led the internal training program — over 50 staff got certified.
I’m proud because I didn’t get fired.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用具体数据（50多名员工认证）体现专业性和成果，符合职场表达规范。选项1和3过于消极，缺乏主动性；选项4不专业且带有负面暗示，不符合积极汇报成就的语境。

content.speakerText: How did you manage to improve customer satisfaction scores so dramatically?
content.speakerTextCn: 你是如何大幅提高客户满意度评分的？

options.text: I just worked harder than everyone else.
We redesigned the feedback system and increased response time by 40%, which boosted satisfaction by 25%.
I don’t know — it just happened.
The customers were just nicer this year.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体措施（重新设计反馈系统）和量化结果（响应时间提升40%，满意度提升25%），符合‘用数据支撑成就’的核心要求。其他选项要么归因于个人努力（不体现协作）、要么推卸责任或缺乏实质性内容，不��合专业汇报标准。

content.template: Thanks! I’m proud we hit the deadline ___ of schedule.
content.hint: 表示‘提前完成’的常用搭配

content.template: I led the internal training program — over ___ staff got certified.
content.hint: 用具体数字增强说服力，参考标准回应中的数字范围
content.knowledgePoint: 用具体数据支撑成就（场景核心表达）

content.template: Probably reducing our support ticket volume by ___% — that was a big win.
content.hint: 常见成就的百分比范围，体现显著改进但不夸张
content.knowledgePoint: 用百分比量化成果（职场成就汇报高频表达）

content.speakerText: What’s one thing you’re most proud of this year?
content.speakerTextCn: 今年你最自豪的一件事是什么？
expectedAnswers: I improved our onboarding process, which reduced new hire ramp-up time by 20%.
I’m most proud of leading the cross-team initiative that cut project delays by 35%.
It’s hard to choose, but I’ve become much more confident in presenting to senior leadership.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应了‘最自豪的成就’，而非泛泛而谈
语言准确性：语法正确，动词时态和介词使用无误
表达自然度：符合职场口语习惯，不生硬或过度夸张
关键词覆盖：是否使用了量化数据（如百分比、数量）或团队/流程关键词

content.speakerText: You really knocked it out of the park with the Q3 client rollout — congrats!
content.speakerTextCn: 你第三季度的客户上线做得太棒了，恭喜！
expectedAnswers: Thanks! It was a team effort — the devs and PMs made it possible.
I’m glad it went well! We actually launched two weeks early.
Thank you! We’re proud we not only met but exceeded the client’s expectations.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否得体回应了表扬，既表达感谢又突出成果或团队
语言准确性：用词恰当，无语法错误，如时态、冠词、介词
表达自然度：语气自然，符合职场日常对话节奏，不机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否使用了团队（team）、提前（ahead）、超出预期（exceeded）等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Can you tell me about a recent success that made a real impact?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能告诉我一个最近产生实际影响的成功吗？
expectedAnswers: We automated our monthly reporting, saving 15 hours per team member each month.
I redesigned the customer onboarding flow — churn dropped by 18% in just two months.
I helped mentor two junior colleagues who both got promoted this quarter.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确说明了‘具体成就’和‘实际影响’
语言准确性：使用了恰当的动词（automated, redesigned, mentored）和量化表达
表达自然度：语句流畅，符合英语母语者日常汇报方式
关键词覆盖：是否包含动词（improved, reduced, automated）、量化数据、结果导向词汇（impact, dropped, saving）
